title: What I Offer
description: I bring an uncommon combination of clinical knowledge, software development, and technical writing to every project. Here's how I can help:

services.title: Full-Stack Web Application Development
services.description: End-to-end development of web applications, from database design and backend logic to responsive frontend interfaces. Comfortable working across the entire stack independently or as part of a team.

services.title: REST API Design & Development
services.description: Designing and building clean, well-structured REST APIs using Django and FastAPI — including authentication, versioning, error handling, and performance optimization. APIs built to scale.

services.title: SaaS Product Development
services.description: Building multi-user, subscription-ready web products with role-based access, dashboards, and the infrastructure needed to support a growing user base.

services.title: API Documentation & Developer Guides
services.description: Writing clear, structured documentation for APIs and developer tools including reference docs, quickstart guides, authentication flows, and code examples that help developers integrate faster.

services.title: Software & Product Documentation
services.description: Creating user manuals, onboarding guides, and product documentation for both technical and non-technical audiences, including clinical teams using health tech products.

services.title: Technical Tutorials & Articles
services.description: Writing in-depth tutorials and how-to articles for developer-focused platforms like freeCodeCamp, Hashnode, and Substack. Complex topics, made accessible.

services.title: Health & Medical Content Writing
services.description: Writing accurate, well-researched health and medical content that bridges the gap between clinical knowledge and general readability, for patient-facing products, healthcare platforms, or medical publications.

workingWithMe.title: Working With Me
points: Clear communication and regular updates throughout every project
Clean, well-documented, maintainable code built to last
Solutions designed with scalability and real-world usage in mind
Writing that is accurate, clear, and tailored to your audience
Reliable delivery with a focus on meeting deadlines and project goals
